---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Image, Cropping and Scaling"
image: social-cards/image-crop-scale.png
---

# 🏗️ Cropping and Scaling {#sec-image-crop-scale}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Cropping and Scaling
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
